atomic_facts.fact: A person is using a black socket wrench to remove a spark plug from an engine.
The spark plug is being pulled out of the engine housing.
The wrench has white text printed on its handle.

spatial: The hands are in the center of the frame, holding the black wrench. The wrench is positioned over the engine component on the right. The spark plug is located between the wrench and the engine block. A black metal frame bar is visible to the left of the hands.
state_changes: Hand uses a socket wrench to remove a spark plug from the engine.

atomic_facts.fact: A hand is holding a black connector with a white ribbed section.
The hand is positioned near the translucent white plastic fluid reservoir.
The fluid reservoir has a black cap secured by bolts.

spatial: The hand holding the connector is in front of the large translucent container and to the left of the fluid reservoir. The black metal frame bar is to the left of the hand and the reservoir.

atomic_facts.fact: A person's hand is gripping and adjusting a black hose.
The hand is positioned near a metallic component and a white container.
The person is wearing a beige hat that partially obscures the top right of the frame.

spatial: The person's hand is in the bottom center, holding the black hose which runs vertically. To the right of the hose is a silver metallic component. To the left is a black metal frame. Behind the hose and hand is a large white container.
state_changes: Hand manipulates a black flexible hose/tube.

atomic_facts.fact: A hand is gripping and manipulating a black mechanical component.
The mechanical component is attached to a larger assembly with visible bolts.
A black metal frame is positioned to the left of the mechanical assembly.

spatial: The hand is positioned below the black mechanical assembly, gripping it from underneath. The black metal frame is to the left of the mechanical assembly. The beige textured object is located above and to the right of the mechanical assembly.

atomic_facts.fact: A hand grasps and pulls a black hose connected to the fluid reservoir.
The fluid reservoir is mounted next to a black metal frame.

spatial: The hand is positioned below and in front of the translucent white fluid reservoir. The reservoir is to the right of the black metal frame bar. The black hose connects the reservoir to the area where the hand is interacting.
state_changes: Hand grasps and pulls a black hose attached to the reservoir.

atomic_facts.fact: A translucent white plastic reservoir is mounted on a vehicle frame.
A black hose connects to the side of the reservoir.
The reservoir is positioned next to a black metal frame.

spatial: The translucent white plastic reservoir is in the center, positioned to the right of the black metal frame structure. The green painted surface is below the reservoir. A rusty metal bracket is to the right of the reservoir.

green painted metal surface

atomic_facts.fact: The translucent white reservoir is static in the center of the frame.
A black hose connects to the top of the reservoir.

spatial: The translucent white reservoir is positioned to the right of the black metal frame bar. The green painted surface is located below the reservoir and the frame.

atomic_facts.fact: A translucent white plastic reservoir is mounted to a vehicle frame.
A black rubber hose is connected to the top of the reservoir.
The reservoir is positioned next to a black metal frame bar.
The assembly is located above a green painted surface.

spatial: The translucent white reservoir is positioned to the right of the black metal frame bar. The black rubber hose is attached to the top of the reservoir and curves downward. The entire assembly is situated above the green painted metal surface.

The white plastic reservoir is mounted next to a dark metal frame.
A black hose connects to the top of the white reservoir.

spatial: The human hand is holding the black hose at the bottom center of the frame. The white plastic reservoir is positioned to the right of the dark metal frame. The black hose is connected to the top of the reservoir and extends downwards towards the hand.
